framework.name: Query Routing Pattern
framework.description: Use a lightweight router to direct incoming requests to specialized downstream agents rather than using a monolithic system. The router analyzes intent and sends queries to the most appropriate specialist (e.g., math agent, coding agent, general chat).
framework.raw_quote: instead of having one giant monolithic model that tries to do absolutely everything, we use a much smaller lightweight router to send the incoming query to the best specialist for that job
